Decision: Submit eval now with current checkpoints.

trajectory.description: Observation: 0.5% success after 500k PPO steps per task. Rewards far below success bars. 2.7h left. Analysis: PPO with 500k steps is grossly insufficient. Need to focus on fewer tasks with more steps. SAC is generally better for continuous control. Decision: Switch to SAC, train 3 most promising tasks (stand, sit_simple, reach) with 1M steps each, continuing from scratch since SAC != PPO.
